title: eragrostis wiseana
intro: Eragrostis wiseana, also known as the Wallaby Grass, is a species of grass native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Eragrostis wiseana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis wiseana are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in water or using them in a tea, and it is also sometimes used in traditional remedies and supplements.
